Not South Florida. Better.

The Second Home
You Actually Escape To.

You've watched South Florida prices double. You've seen the traffic on I-95, the crowded beaches, the $2M condos with $3,000-a-month HOA fees. You wanted a second home that felt like a real escape — not just a different version of the same city.

"Rock Tree is what the dream of a second home is actually supposed to feel like."

Five architecturally designed jungle residences above Dominical, Costa Rica. Pacific ocean views. Mountain sunsets. A private plunge pool. A car waiting at the airport when you land. Full maintenance and housekeeping included. From Boston or New York, it's a direct flight to San José. From LA, it's closer than Miami. And it's a world away from everything else.

Five Homes.

The Actual Property · Tinamastes · Costa Rica

The Land. The Pool. The Mountain Behind.

The real site — a private plunge pool framed by river stone, surrounded by lush tropical gardens, with the jungle-clad mountains of the Southern Zone rising beyond.

Architecture · Modern Contemporary

Clean Lines in the Canopy

Crisp modern facades of concrete and glass, integrated into the hillside. Expansive terraces frame mountain sunsets and distant Pacific shimmer.

Interior · Open Plan Living

2BR · 2BA · ~1,750 sqft

High ceilings, natural materials, floor-to-ceiling glass opening to covered terrace and plunge pool beyond.

Amenity · Private Plunge Pool

Infinity Edge into the Horizon

Every residence features a private plunge pool positioned to capture the maximum sweep of jungle canopy and Pacific coastline.

Architectural Plans

Designed with
Precision & Purpose.

Each Rock Tree residence follows a thoughtfully crafted floor plan — two bedrooms, two baths, open-plan living and dining, a dedicated office, a covered deck, and a lower master suite with balcony, walk-in closet, and private bath. Every square foot is optimised for tropical living and the views beyond.

Built from the Land

Crafted from
Costa Rica's
Finest Materials.

Every Rock Tree residence is constructed using locally sourced, sustainably harvested Costa Rican materials. Building with what the land provides means each home carries the soul of its setting — and supports the communities and forests that surround it.

🌳

Teak (Teca)

Costa Rican plantation teak — used for structural beams, decking, window frames, and interior millwork. Naturally weather-resistant, beautiful with age, and grown locally in Guanacaste and the Southern Zone.

🪵

Laurel & Cristóbal Hardwoods

Indigenous tropical hardwoods harvested under SINAC-certified forestry programs. Used for cabinetry, flooring, stair treads, and architectural accents throughout each residence.

🪨

River Stone & Local Volcanic Rock

Hand-selected river stones from the Río General valley and volcanic basalt from the surrounding highlands — used in accent walls, pool surrounds, and landscape features.

🏗️

Costa Rican Concrete & Steel

Seismic-grade reinforced concrete and locally fabricated structural steel ensure each home meets the highest safety standards while minimizing transportation impacts.

🌿

Bamboo & Guadua

Giant Guadua bamboo — one of the most sustainable building materials in the tropics — featured in feature walls, screens, landscaping, and pergola elements.

🧱

Handmade Ceramic Tile

Artisan-crafted tiles from local Costa Rican workshops — used in kitchens, bathrooms, and outdoor terraces. Each tile is unique, carrying the mark of the hands that made it.

The Panorama

Mountain Sunsets.
Pacific Horizons.

Watch the sun dissolve into the Pacific from your terrace. By night, the lights of Manuel Antonio National Park shimmer on the water. By morning, mist rolls through the jungle below. This is a view that never grows familiar.

Life in the Jungle,
Without Compromise.

Tropical Jungle Setting

Primary rainforest — toucans, howler monkeys & waterfalls

Concierge Living

Every arrival a
five-star
homecoming.

Rock Tree is engineered for owners who want to arrive, breathe, and be completely at ease. From the moment your plane touches down in San José to the moment you return home, everything is arranged.

01

Airport Car Delivery

Your personal vehicle is stored at our lot near Juan Santamaría International Airport and driven to arrivals the moment you land.

02

Arrival Housekeeping

Your home is prepared before you arrive — fresh linens, stocked kitchen, fresh orchard fruit, and flowers from the garden.

03

In-Residence Maid Service

Flexible daily or scheduled housekeeping available during your stay, tailored to your preferences and schedule.

04

Departure Care

Full home preparation upon departure — your home is secured, aired, and maintained in perfect condition while you're away.

✈️

SJO → Your Doorstep

Your vehicle is garaged near Juan Santamaría International Airport in San José. Notify us of your arrival, and your car will be waiting at the terminal — ready for the scenic drive down through the mountains to Tinamastes.

📍
Tinamastes, Costa Rica
9°19'N · 83°51'W
The Location

Between Two
Worlds

    Dominical Beach
